name: Remote SSH
description: SSH into remote devices and execute shell commands transparently on remote machines.
author: AlpacaKnight

commands.name: /remote
commands.description: Manage the current remote SSH session and execute commands on the remote machine.

tools.name: remote_connect
tools.description: Connect to a remote device via SSH. After connecting, all shell commands in this conversation will execute on the remote machine.

tools.name: remote_reconnect
tools.description: Reconnect to the remote machine using cached connection parameters. Use when the previous SSH connection was lost.

tools.name: remote_disconnect
tools.description: Disconnect from the current remote SSH session.

tools.name: remote_list
tools.description: Show the current remote SSH connection status.

tools.name: remote_exec
tools.description: Explicitly execute a command on the remote machine via SSH.

tools.name: remote_info
tools.description: Show detailed information about the remote machine: OS, architecture, kernel, shell, CPU, memory, disk, and available development tools.

tools.name: remote_health
tools.description: Check the health status of the current remote SSH connection: status, latency, failures, reconnect availability.

tools.name: remote_set_cwd
tools.description: Set the default remote working directory for this session. All subsequent commands will execute in this directory.

tools.name: remote_sudo
tools.description: Execute a command with sudo privileges on the remote machine. Requires sudo password to be configured.
